title: Creamy Mushroom Fettuccine
description: Rich and creamy fettuccine dish infused with earthy mushroom flavors.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook 8 oz fettuccine according to package directions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tbsp of butter over medium heat.
Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start browning.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Stir in heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Drain the cooked fettuccine and add it to the skillet with the mushroom sauce.
Toss the fettuccine to coat it evenly with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Spoon the fettuccine into a bowl and serve.
